schedule: Monday: 11:00 AM – 7:30 PM | Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 7:30 PM | Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 7:30 PM | Thursday: 11:00 AM – 7:30 PM | Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:30 PM | Saturday: 11:00 AM – 8:30 PM | Sunday: 11:00 AM – 6:30 PM
reviews_json:
[{"author": "Lifeooferic", "rating": 5, "text": "​A Sweet Indulgence at American's Cookies 🍪
​I recently had the pleasure of visiting American's Cookies, and it was a delightful experience from start to finish. The clean, modern interior with a "it's coffee and cookies time" sign immediately puts you in the mood for a treat.
​The star of the show, of course, was the cookies. I was impressed by the wide variety, especially the limited-time flavors for the week of July 28 - August 3, which included:
​Brownie Pistachio Golden Bar
​Lemon Cheesecake
​Teddy Graham Honey
​Brookies
​Blue Sky Chips Ahoy!
​Chocolate Chip Chunk
​The cookies I tried were absolutely amazing. They were beautifully decorated and looked incredibly fresh. The combination of classic flavors and creative new options is a big win.
​To complement my cookie, I ordered a matcha drink, which was also incredible. It was the perfect pairing to the sweetness of the cookies, offering a refreshing and vibrant contrast.
​Overall, American's Cookies is a must-visit for any dessert lover. The quality of the treats, the inviting atmosphere, and the delicious drinks make it a top-notch spot for a sweet indulgence. I highly recommend it!", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-07-31T19:40:54.815394583Z", "relative_time": "10 months ago"}, {"author": "Myuu", "rating": 5, "text": "I absolutely adore this place. The cookies are so tasty and sweet and you can really feel the difference between each of them. I don’t recommend going that often because of the high level of sugar, but it’s a nice play to go every now and then. Full recommend it", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-09-20T04:05:07.141210245Z", "relative_time": "8 months ago"}, {"author": "Guilhem Cayzac", "rating": 5, "text": "As a French amateur of fine pâtisserie, I fully recommend these ones.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2024-11-05T13:51:49.277156Z", "relative_time": "a year ago"}, {"author": "Helen M.", "rating": 5, "text": "They were amazing, the flavors kept changing, and I was truly amazed at how delicious they were without being just sugary. They're not cheap, but the quality definitely makes them 100% worth it.", "language": "en-US", "published_at": "2026-02-28T19:20:38.392074193Z", "relative_time": "3 months ago"}, {"author": "Victor Prato", "rating": 4, "text": "We went on a Sunday afternoon looking for something sweet and were pleasantly surprised by this cookie selection. We loved that they offered two sizes and that the menu changes every week—a really nice touch!

This time, we had a menu with options like Lotus, Red Velvet, and Chocolate Chip. We chose those three in the large size… and they really are large. But beyond the size, they were delicious.

It's an excellent option if you're looking for creative, unique, and flavorful cookies. We'll definitely be back to try next week's new creations.", "language": "en-US", "published_at": "2025-04-07T15:59:07.423500Z", "relative_time": "a year ago"}]

name: Panda House | Centennial
address: en la, Rotonda de centennial 140496, Panamá, Provincia de Panamá, Panama
schedule: Monday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Tuesday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Wednesday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Thursday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Friday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Saturday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Sunday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM
reviews_json:
[{"author": "Panama George", "rating": 5, "text": "I am in awe at the food, service and facility. I had a dish with fried rice, thick noodles and shrimp. The amount of shrimp was half of the entire dish. Very satisfying and reasonably priced. The seating area is modern, large with a mix of small to large tables.

This is a cafeteria style establishment that serves some of the most popular Chinese options. When thinking of cafeteria food, one has to wonder if it is comparable to that of a made-to-order restaurant. The answer is a resounding yes. The food here is excellent. So is the service we received as well as the aesthetics of the place.

The sheer size of it, along with an accompanying bakery as well as an (apparently) independent restaurant on the second floor is brilliant. A space so large, with excellent service, modern facility where the main attraction is supplemented with two other businesses. Unusually tall ceiling with lots of natural light. There is a spirit of ambition here.

This is the type of place you go to if you don’t want to be bothered by a waiter. Another plus is the large parking lot in the back area.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2022-02-16T04:50:53.591063Z", "relative_time": "4 years ago"}, {"author": "Jihye Yoon", "rating": 5, "text": "Food was delicious with reasonable price for a meal. name: PLAZA 88
address: 2FHG+Q26, Av Condado del Rey, Panamá, Provincia de Panamá, Panama
schedule: Monday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Tuesday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Wednesday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Thursday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Friday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Saturday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Sunday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM
reviews_json:
[{"author": "Panama George", "rating": 5, "text": "Here is a plaza where you will find six Asian restaurants, three grocery stores, dry cleaner, copy/printer, clothing, bubble tea, wholesale distributor, and postal service.

Most of the restaurants are Chinese and each one tries to niche in things like traditional dishes, hot pot, soups, ramen, and barbecue. The two places that offer traditional dishes are literally right next to each other and highly recommended by the community. There is also a Vietnamese restaurant.

It is no surprise that you will see families in the restaurants while the dessert and bubble tea spots will attract the younger crowd. It should be noted that the downside of this plaza is the parking situation. There are about eighty parking spaces but they all get filled quite often.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-12-30T04:55:57.527667581Z", "relative_time": "5 months ago"}, {"author": "Carlos Mora (ritocs)", "rating": 1, "text": "Plenty of food places, all good, the Vietnam Cuisine recent addition is one of the best. Its a shame is almost impossible to get a parking lot here, it seems that just with the workers vehicles they're almost full. I recommend you take a taxi to get here otherwise you'll be driving around for a while. Also, not sure if this happens all the time but the fire alarm is annoying and seems to be triggered by cooking smoke all the time. And again, my review if for the Plaza, which seems to be poorly managed, not about the restaurants that are outstanding!", "language": "en", "published_at": "2024-08-20T09:37:34.015752Z", "relative_time": "a year ago"}, {"author": "Ayrton Moreno", "rating": 1, "text": "This is asian/Chinese design place, always is going to be difficult to get anything. If you don't want a challenge to get anything or ready to fight to get something, good food is not enough or worthy for something that is designed for that community and not other ppl.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-03-24T02:26:04.843690Z", "relative_time": "a year ago"}, {"author": "Stevey", "rating": 4, "text": "Lots of Chinese stores, Chinese market. Also people drive so slow in the parking lot and blocks the way so often.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2023-02-13T00:54:14.963931Z", "relative_time": "3 years ago"}, {"author": "chetan chheda", "rating": 3, "text": "Parking too much problem", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-11-24T03:00:08.820374039Z", "relative_time": "6 months ago"}]

Servers attentive, and the food fresh.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2026-02-08T16:43:36.572904410Z", "relative_time": "4 months ago"}, {"author": "Stevey", "rating": 3, "text": "The food is good, a bit too salty for my taste. Prices are on the moderate side. You can sing karaoke here, and they have some gachapon machines to get toys for your kids.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2026-01-28T00:24:38.858589628Z", "relative_time": "4 months ago"}, {"author": "Panama George", "rating": 5, "text": "This is very likely the best hot pot restaurant I have been to. The facility is professionally decorated with many tables and even individual rooms for privacy. I find that this place has a cheerful ambiance thanks to the bright lighting.

I have to give special credit to the station that houses the ingredients. It is the nicest display I have ever seen. Well-designed, you will find ingredients such as minced ginger, cilantro, traditional hot sauce, and chili powder, just to name a few. On top of that, there is a sign with recipes for making delicious mixes. No hot pot experience is complete without the fun of choosing your own ingredients.

I have been here four times and I am always impressed at the selection. The beef options include items you will not find elsewhere such as shoulder steak, angus beef, sukiyaki beef, wagyu and even argentinian angus. The only bad thing about this place is the lack of parking. It is situated in a busy plaza and parking space is limited.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2023-11-26T05:22:51.047812Z", "relative_time": "2 years ago"}, {"author": "Htet Htet", "rating": 5, "text": "Good place, more options than the one in Paitilla", "language": "en", "published_at": "2026-03-28T20:51:08.591511263Z", "relative_time": "2 months ago"}]

name: Olive Garden | Altaplaza
address: Altaplaza Mall Local Nº 2-208, Panama City, Panamá Province, Panama
types: italian_restaurant, wine_bar, seafood_restaurant, family_restaurant, bar, american_restaurant, restaurant, food, point_of_interest, establishment
schedule: Monday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Thursday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Friday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Saturday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Sunday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM
reviews_json:
[{"author": "Shannon McKenzie", "rating": 5, "text": "One of the best eat out experience I have had in a while, relaxing atmosphere, kind and attentive staff and the most creamy carbonera and delicious I ever had. If there was a 6 star rating I would give it.. Wow..", "language": "en", "published_at": "2026-01-16T18:00:51.344406445Z", "relative_time": "4 months ago"}, {"author": "Lifeooferic", "rating": 5, "text": "​If you’re looking for the ultimate comfort food experience in Panama City, the Olive Garden at Altaplaza Mall remains a heavy hitter. From the iconic cheese-grating ritual to the massive portions, it’s the kind of place where you go in hungry and leave planning your next nap.
​The Food: Classic Comfort
​The photos capture the essence of what makes Olive Garden a global favorite: consistency and carbs.
​The "Tour of Italy" : This is the heavyweight champion of the menu. It features three OG classics: Chicken Parmigiana, Lasagna Classico, and their signature Fettuccine Alfredo. The chicken was crispy, and the lasagna had that deep, slow-simmered meat sauce flavor that pairs perfectly with the creamy Alfredo.
​Chicken Alfredo: You can’t go wrong with the sliced grilled chicken over fettuccine. The sauce is made fresh with parmesan, cream, and garlic—it's thick, rich, and clings to the pasta exactly how it should.
​Spaghetti with Meatballs : A simple, soulful dish. The meat sauce (a blend of pan-seared beef and Italian sausage) is savory with just the right amount of acidity from the tomatoes.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-12-17T15:06:57.538961871Z", "relative_time": "5 months ago"}, {"author": "Levi Gudiño", "rating": 5, "text": "Felipe was a great server, he had a lot of attention to detail and provided an exceptional experience overall", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-05-28T00:15:33.737435Z", "relative_time": "a year ago"}, {"author": "Panama", "rating": 5, "text": "Norelis y Daniel were wonderful. The service was excellent and the food delicious. A warm and inviting atmosphere. We’ll definitely be back.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-12-04T17:27:28.636079749Z", "relative_time": "6 months ago"}, {"author": "Je Se", "rating": 5, "text": "It's an A-typical Olive Garden restaurant just like you'd find in the states regarding name recognition, furniture, atmosphere, etc. However, it's very airy and open as just about anywhere you are sitting, you can see the happenings just outside as mall shoppers go by.

In the afternoon, I don't indulge in heavy and/or large meals, so I just had their soup and a Chocolaty Café Mocca. I sampled 3 of their quite delicious soups: Minestrone, Pasta E Fagioli and the Chicken And Gnocchi.

Excellent to say the least. However, like many others, my favorite is the Pasta E Fagioli. A chilli type of soup loaded with beans, spices, meat, pasta shells, emersed in a tomato broth or base.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2024-08-09T16:31:40.275864Z", "relative_time": "a year ago"}]

name: SUSHI STREET
address: Vía Ricardo J. Alfaro, Panamá, Provincia de Panamá, Panama
schedule: Monday: 1:00 PM – 10:00 AM | Tuesday: 1:00 – 10:00 PM | Wednesday: 1:00 – 10:00 PM | Thursday: 1:00 – 10:00 PM | Friday: 1:00 – 11:00 PM | Saturday: 1:00 – 11:00 PM | Sunday: 1:00 – 10:00 PM
reviews_json:
[{"author": "Kedin Sanchez", "rating": 5, "text": "As an indecisive customer, I walked into this shop not knowing it would be such a great experience.
Both of the young women who helped me today were incredibly patient in helping me choose the perfect combination. Friendly smiles, premium service, and the quality of the product were the icing on the cake. I 100% recommend going here for a drink. You'll go for the drinks and come back for the excellent service. 5 stars because I can't give it 10. By the way, you can take pictures with Felix from Stray Kids, haha, and that's a super bonus.", "language": "en-US", "published_at": "2026-02-12T20:06:34.024677330Z", "relative_time": "4 months ago"}, {"author": "Joymar Morgan", "rating": 1, "text": "I don't usually write reviews, but what happened at Sushi Street was too much. We literally waited two and a half hours for our food… and it was only four pieces of sushi. Four. It wasn't a big order, it wasn't complicated at all, and yet it seemed like they were just catching the salmon on the spot.

The worst part wasn't just the wait, it was the attitude. Nobody explained anything to us. We asked questions, and the girls answered curtly, with sour faces, as if we were bothering them by wanting to know what was happening with our own food. Zero empathy, zero genuine apologies.

When they finally brought the sushi, we were already completely exhausted from the stress. And to top it all off, it looked awful. All drenched in oil, super greasy, poorly presented. It really gave a bad impression. Sushi shouldn't look like that; it looked like it was made carelessly, like it was just thrown there.

The flavor wasn't great either. It didn't taste fresh, and the texture was strange. After waiting so long, you expect it to at least be worth it, but no. It was a complete disappointment.

The atmosphere felt disorganized; no one seemed to know what was going on. There was no attempt to make up for the wait, not even an "I apologize for the delay," nothing. It was as if making people wait almost three hours was perfectly normal.

Honestly, I left feeling frustrated. We wasted time, patience, and money. I wouldn't go back, and I don't recommend it. There are far better places for sushi than to put up with something like this.", "language": "en-US", "published_at": "2026-02-26T02:00:03.008400010Z", "relative_time": "3 months ago"}, {"author": "Mayté Pérez", "rating": 1, "text": "Terrible experience. We had to wait over an hour and a half for our food, which is completely unacceptable. When it finally arrived, the food was mediocre, nothing to justify the wait. The portions were also small.

But the worst part was the service. The waitress was rude. Even worse, one of my friends, who is allergic to shrimp, was served a dish that wasn't what he ordered and contained shrimp. The waitress reacted with mockery, treating it like a joke. This is not only disrespectful but also a serious health risk. I definitely do not recommend this place. If they continue with this terrible service, they will lose even more customers.", "language": "en-US", "published_at": "2026-03-23T01:17:42.370729794Z", "relative_time": "2 months ago"}, {"author": "Ibis Rodríguez C.", "rating": 5, "text": "They have a new customer! name: Restaurante El Trapiche | Albrook Mall
address: frente a los estacionamientos pasillo La Cebra, Albrook Mall, Av. Luis Alvarez E, Panamá, Provincia de Panamá, Panama
schedule: Monday: 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Tuesday: 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Wednesday: 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Thursday: 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Friday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Saturday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Sunday: 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM
reviews_json: [{"author": "Leonard Smith", "rating": 5, "text": "On my 2 month work trip we ate at this place at least 5 times (may not seem like a lot, but the most we ate at any another place was twice). The menu was very extensive and covered all taste and diets. We have a vegetarian and pescatarian in our group and they looked forward to eating here. The service was polite and attentive. We sat in the covered outside part most times and were very comfortable. The one time we sat on the inside we were a little warm. That was the only issue we ever had.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2026-03-12T15:55:07.945398279Z", "relative_time": "3 months ago"}, {"author": "Kate - Mornings Abroad", "rating": 5, "text": "This restaurant is a must-visit when you are in Panama City. We ordered the all-in-one platter to try all the popular Panamanian foods and the hojaldre sandwich, which was the bomb! Was not a fan of the raspao’ because the ice chucks were too big - I thought it was supposed to be shaved ice?", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-10-27T20:51:48.776830721Z", "relative_time": "7 months ago"}, {"author": "Local Guide Level 10", "rating": 5, "text": "Raul and Edwin the waiters very good customer service 💯 🔥  Excellent foods! Everything is delicious! Try the Bistec, Tripas or Ropa vieja with Yuca & Patacones. For dessert try the chayote pie and cappuccino. Believe me when I say \"Come here to eat and you will be happy!\" The cooks do a fantastic job cooking with true Panama flavors & spices! So delicious! I'll bring more family and friends to visit because Raul and Edwin and everyone doing a great job! 👍 This restaurant is 5 stars and should open franchise in USA and all over Panama 🇵🇦 🇺🇸 🌎", "language": "en", "published_at": "2025-07-24T23:34:59.463339395Z", "relative_time": "10 months ago"}, {"author": "Cadijah Irving", "rating": 5, "text": "Best food ive had so far in my entire stay here in Panama City. I'll definitely be returning. The food is incredible, they have clearly marked Vegan options as well which I really appreciated.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2026-02-25T13:54:25.700820874Z", "relative_time": "3 months ago"}, {"author": "Reza Sattarzadeh Nowbari", "rating": 4, "text": "This is a good place to taste some authentic Panamanian dishes. The place is usually crowded and very well liked by locals. I had a food platter, which was OK. I also ordered salad but would not recommend that since it only contained lettuce with just a little bit of pickled onion and little tomato. Also, the portion of the chicken soup was more of a kids' meal that something to be served for clients. Overall, the experience was just fine, though nothing spectacular.", "language": "en", "published_at": "2024-08-04T00:51:30.872327Z", "relative_time": "a year ago"}]
